strategic_objective: Assess the impact of duplicated rows on feature correlation strength and dependency inflation to understand redundancy effects on dataset structure.
key_checks: Quantify the proportion and distribution of duplicated rows in the dataset
Compare feature correlation matrices before and after deduplication
Evaluate changes in feature importance or dependency concentration post-deduplication
Check for persistence or attenuation of near-perfect correlations after removing duplicates
success_criteria: Clear evidence that deduplication reduces inflated correlations and dependency measures
Identification of features whose dependency profiles are robust versus sensitive to redundancy
Bounded understanding of how redundancy biases downstream structural interpretations
router_constraints: preserve feature_scope related to correlated features
preserve dataset scope for duplication context
